rationale.R1.2: Identifies the contradiction between the claim and results but doesn't fully propose a fix.
rationale.R1.3: Doesn't thoroughly audit all claims against evidence.
rationale.R1.4: Names prior work but doesn't clearly articulate the novelty of SonicNet.
rationale.RX.1: Does not explicitly state uncertainty for any claims.
rationale.RX.3: Mostly covers the requested dimensions, with a minor drift towards discussing the model architecture.
rationale.RX.4: No evidence of harmful content or regressions.
rationale.RX.5: Doesn't provide traceability for proposed revisions.
